content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed the refactoring that replaces separate ensure_beads_mutation_health + sync_flush call pairs with atomic sync_if_dirty_when_beads_healthy calls in project.rs and service.rs. The changes are correct and actually improve safety by eliminating TOCTOU races — health is now checked under the sync lock rather than outside it. The removed ensure_beads_claim_sync_health function is fully subsumed by sync_if_dirty_when_beads_healthy. The new sync_beads_mutation_if_dirty_when_healthy helper in service.rs correctly maps both SyncIfDirtyHealthError variants to AppError::MilestoneOperationFailed. The two new tests are well-constructed: they inject health problems (conflict markers, malformed JSON) during the dep add command callback and verify that the health check blocks the flush before br sync --flush-only runs. All 794 tests pass, clippy is clean with -D warnings, and fmt is clean. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
